---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Tidelands Analytics"
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-style: none
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
---

::: {.hero}

::: {.hero-content}

# Let the data guide you.

Data analysis consulting for businesses ready to act on what their data says. We turn complex data into clear, interactive intelligence — from spreadsheets and SQL queries to Shiny dashboards and automated reports.

[See our work](apps.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg .me-2}
[Get in touch](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light .btn-lg}

:::

:::

::: {.section-light}

## What we do

::: {.grid .service-grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-3}
::: {.service-card}
[]{.fa-solid .fa-database .service-icon}

### Data collection
Spreadsheets, templates, and SQL queries that capture clean data the first time.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-3}
::: {.service-card}
[]{.fa-solid .fa-chart-line .service-icon}

### Analysis & trending
Surfacing the patterns that matter — what's changing, what's not, and what to do about it.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-3}
::: {.service-card}
[]{.fa-solid .fa-chart-column .service-icon}

### Interactive dashboards
Custom Shiny applications that put live data exploration in your team's hands.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-3}
::: {.service-card}
[]{.fa-solid .fa-file-lines .service-icon}

### Automated reporting
R Markdown, Quarto, and Crystal Reports pipelines delivered on schedule.
:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {.section}

## Our toolbox

::: {.toolbox}
[Excel]{.tool-badge}
[[R](https://www.r-project.org/){.tool-badge target="_blank"}]{}
[[Shiny](https://shiny.posit.co/){.tool-badge target="_blank"}]{}
[[R Markdown](https://rmarkdown.rstudio.com/){.tool-badge target="_blank"}]{}
[[Quarto](https://quarto.org/){.tool-badge target="_blank"}]{}
[SQL]{.tool-badge}
[Crystal Reports]{.tool-badge}
[[Plotly](https://plotly.com/){.tool-badge target="_blank"}]{}
[Tableau]{.tool-badge}
:::

:::

::: {.section-light}

## Featured work

A glimpse of what we've built. [See full portfolio →](apps.qmd)

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.feature-card}
![Pharmaceutical Release Testing Dashboard](assets/app-pharma-1.png)

### Pharmaceutical Release Testing
Predictive analysis, control charts, and risk assessment for QC laboratory workflows.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.feature-card}
![Microbial Monitoring Dashboard](assets/app-micro-1.png)

### Microbial Monitoring
Environmental monitoring and contamination tracking across facilities and timeframes.
:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {.cta-section}

## Ready to see what your data is telling you?

Most projects start with a 30-minute conversation. Let's find out if we're a fit.

[Contact us](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-light .btn-lg}

:::
